steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage starts by noting that Ruth Asawa "was dedicated to more than the creation of art," immediately establishing her commitment to art education as the core focus. The following sentences describe her founding two San Francisco-specific programs to bring art to children.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice C directly captures this focus by highlighting her art education initiatives in San Francisco. The other three choices either misrepresent her actions (A: she didn’t inspire others, she led them; B: no comparison to nationwide audiences; D: she didn’t abandon sculpting entirely). That matches choice C — C is correct.
